zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Kingston於1525年9月3日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格亞特 格利姆斯比 聖 瑪麗 安德 聖 詹姆斯時，她的父親Anthony Kingston35歲，母親Lady Dorothy Harpur26歲。她於1542年與Sir Thomas Kingston在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1599年6月4日在英國瓦維其可爾享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Kingston于1525年9月3日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾格亞特 格利姆斯比 聖 瑪麗 安德 聖 詹姆斯时，她的父亲Anthony Kingston35岁，母亲Lady Dorothy Harpur26岁。她于1542年与Sir Thomas Kingston在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1599年6月4日在英国瓦維其可爾享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England called Kingston or Kingstone. Almost all of them derive from Old English cyning, cing ‘king’ (genitive cyninges, cinges) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have a different etymology, such as Kingston on Soar in Nottinghamshire, which derives from Old English cyne ‘royal’ + stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Kingston was born on 3 September 1525, in Great Grimsby St Mary and St James, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Anthony Kingston, was 35 and her mother, Lady Dorothy Harpur, was 26. She married Sir Thomas Kingston in 1542, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 4 June 1599, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 73.

Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Kingston en 1542, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 juin 1599, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

September 1525 in Great Grimsby St Mary and St James, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anthony Kingston 35 und ihre Mutter Lady Dorothy Harpur 26. Sie hat 1542 in England Sir Thomas Kingston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. Juni 1599 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Warwickshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Kingston(이)가 1525년 9월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그리트 그림스비 스트 메리 앤드 스트 자메스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anthony Kingston(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Dorothy Harpur(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1542년 영국에서 Sir Thomas Kingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1599년 6월 4일 영국 워윅실르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.3 September 1525–4 June 1599: 3 de setembro de 1525–4 de junho de 1599
pt.Stratford-upon-Avon, Stratford-on-Avon d: Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Great Grimsby, North East Lincolnshire d: Great Grimsby St Mary and St James, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.South Ormsby, East Lindsey District, Lin: South Ormesby with Ketsby and Calceby and Driby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Kingston nasceu em 3 de setembro de 1525, em Great Grimsby St Mary and St James, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Anthony Kingston, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Dorothy Harpur, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Kingston em 1542, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de junho de 1599, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Kingston родилась 3 сентября 1525 г. в местности грит гримсби ст мэри анд ст джемесь, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Anthony Kingston было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Dorothy Harpur, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Kingston в 1542 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 июня 1599 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor Kingston nació el 3 de septiembre de 1525, en Great Grimsby St Mary and St James, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Anthony Kingston, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Dorothy Harpur, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Kingston en 1542, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de junio de 1599, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
